Guideline: Formal, professional, and instructive. Polite phrasing with Veuillez in prompts.
Inclusive writing with parenthetical notation: employe(e)s, un(e) employe(e), selectionne(e), notifie(e)s. The pattern ils/elles used for pronouns.
French capitalization: minimal. Feature names after quotes are lowercase unless proper nouns.
Spaced straight quotes with internal spaces around quoted text for widget/feature names: Widget " Favoris ". Note the spaces inside the quotes.
French typography: space before : ; ! ? (e.g., Cree par :, Entite :).
{{variable}} placeholders preserved. Mo for megabytes (not MB).
Preposition-linked: Parametres des comportements, Bibliotheques de comportement, Details du champ.
Kept: Check-in(s), Widget, Feedback, Chat, Coaching, SFTP, API, CSV. Translated: Analytics Hub -> Plateforme d analyses. PII -> DCP (Donnees a Caractere Personnel) in some contexts.
Infinitive for buttons: Publier, Annuler, Supprimer, Rafraichir. Imperative formal for instructions: Selectionnez..., Enregistrez...
Enable: Activer la fonction " X " or Activer le widget " X ". Confirmations: Voulez-vous vraiment...? Success: ...correctement publiees. Empty states: Aucun(e) ... pour le moment.

Check-in=Check-in (kept); Review=Bilan; Goal=Objectif; Employee=Employe(e); Manager=Manager (kept); Compensation=Remuneration; Behavior=Comportement; PII=DCP/PII; Career Development=Developpement de carriere; Settings=Parametres; Template=Modele; Proxy=Acces procuration
